P[n],c=P[n]-(939283-939282),c+(896896+-896895)if P[n]==183847+-183847 then P[n],f[n]=nil,nil end n=A[c]end end,{}return(v(654731+11688184,{}))(u(a))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[c(525891+-481356)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
